data.body: SUPERSEDED + retired: the cross-stack batching approach was evaluated by the Phase-2 design spike and rejected (g2p fires CI per-patchset → N runs not 1; landing N off one run needs a GerriScary-class Verified direct-cast; wins only in rare bursts + bisection tax + WIP fragility). Replaced by the deferred bounded-speculation idea c3a9-5f4c-bdc6-4e27. Archiving this story.
